title: Method overrides should not change contracts
description: This rule checks if a method override changes the method's original contract.
message: Method override potentially changes the contract.
recommendation: Consider refactoring the method to adhere to its original contract

noncompliant.description: Method override changes the return value

compliant.description: Method override does not change the return value

why_is_this_an_issue: Method overrides can change the behavior of the original methods, leading to unexpected results.
how_to_fix: Ensure that the method override preserves the original contract.

metadata.title: Method overrides should not change contracts
